Test checklist — click to mark done
  • 📋 Orders Kanban board

    Login as owner → go to Orders. See Kanban with columns: New, Confirmed, In progress, Done. Click any card to see order details and change status.

  • 🎯 Lead pipeline

    Orders → Leads tab → click "+ New lead" → fill name and phone → Save. Move lead through stages: New → Contacted → Quoted → then "Convert to order".

  • 🌐 Self-booking page

    Open booking page in a private/incognito tab. Fill the form, pick an available date (green), submit. Then check Leads tab — new lead with "Online" badge should appear.

  • ✍️ Digital contract

    Create an order with client email = bestmover.flow@gmail.com → change status to Confirmed → check email for contract link → open link → draw signature → submit. Verify "Signed" status appears on order card.

  • 💳 Invoice & online payment

    Complete an order → Invoices → Generate → change status to Sent → Copy share link → open in browser → click "Pay now" → use test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242 / 12/28 / 123 → invoice auto-updates to Paid.

  • 📱 Crew mobile view

    Open /crew/login on your phone (use Chrome). Login: crew@test.com / Crew1234! → see today's and tomorrow's jobs → tap "Start move" → check Orders board on desktop — card moves to In progress.

  • 🤖 AI analytics

    Dashboard → AI Insights tab → read 4 auto-generated business insights. Then type a question in chat: "Which crew is most profitable?" or "Why did revenue drop?" — AI responds with specific numbers from your data. Limit: 5 questions/day.

  • 📅 Schedule calendar

    Click Schedule in top navigation → see all orders on a calendar. Switch between Week and Month view. Orders are color-coded by status.

  • 📁 File upload to order

    Open any order → scroll to Files section → click "+ Upload" → attach a PDF or image → file appears in list with download option.

Known issues

StripeTest mode — no real charges Safe
AI questions5 per day per account
